Document:
# Rule D2: PvP Zones
- Vaults and Caches that spawn in with an automated No Fly Zone announcement are PvP Zones. - A PvP zone does not mean you can immediately initiate killing upon entering into the No Fly Zone, but that there are looser restrictions on Escalation and Roleplay requirements. - You are not required to get medical help for those that you fight within the PvP Zones, but you are not to block off or attack Medical coming to aid them. - If you are crit/killed in a PvP zone, upon recovery you are not to continue fighting and are considered defeated and should depart.
